chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.21 of 2020 Azhar Mehmood Hamidi Versus Askari Bank Limited and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case (priority) 1. For order on office objection/reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.690/2020 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 29.04.2024 Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Muhammad Ishaq Ali, Advocate for Respondent No.1..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa, associate of Mr. Wasique Ahmed Kehar, Advocate for the appellant has been instructed not to press this appeal along with listed application. The appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
